title: Computing a Percentage of a Total
notes: A CASE inside SUM aggregates only the matching rows (department 10's payroll); dividing by SUM(sal) gives its share of the whole. The multiply-by-100.0 (rather than 100) is essential for portability: integer/integer division in SQLite and PostgreSQL would truncate the ratio to 0. The 100.0 forces decimal arithmetic on every engine; the result is ROUNDed to 2 decimals.
